home.title: Bayes Global
home.subtitle: Premium Qualitative Research Execution in Emerging Markets

about.title: About Bayes Global
about.subtitle: Your Trusted Bridge to Emerging Market Insights
about.description: Bayes Global is a Hong Kong-registered research execution partner specializing in qualitative recruitment and fieldwork across high-growth emerging markets (Latin America, Middle East, Southeast Asia, Africa). We combine deep China-market expertise with globally compliant operations, enabling seamless cross-border research delivery.
about.mission: We eliminate language, cultural, and operational barriers by delivering end-to-end qualitative execution services that are 100% compliant, rigorously quality-controlled, and grounded in authentic local voices — empowering Chinese enterprises to make insight-driven global decisions.

leadership.title: Leadership
leadership.name: Griffin Wang
leadership.quote: In 18 years of research leadership, I've learned that a single inauthentic respondent can invalidate an entire study's insights. At Bayes, we bring senior researcher rigor to every emerging market project — because absolute respondent authenticity isn't optional, it's the foundation of everything we do.
background: 18+ Years of Dual Expertise: Held senior research and product leadership roles at Baidu, 58.com, TNS, Horizon, and iResearch — bridging internet industry insight with market research methodology

Research-Driven Execution Philosophy: Applies analyst-level rigor to fieldwork operations, from predictive risk assessment to real-time anomaly detection — eliminating the traditional gap between research design and on-ground implementation
Uncompromising Quality Standards: Dedicated to embedding rigorous research logic into overseas fieldwork operations, redefining data collection excellence for Chinese enterprises expanding globally

partner.title: Why Partner with Bayes Global
partner.subtitle: Your Gateway to Premium Chinese Research Projects — Zero Payment Risk, Maximum Efficiency

items.title: Guaranteed Payment Security
items.desc: Eliminate payment delays and currency risks entirely. All project funds are secured upfront through our Hong Kong entity with full legal compliance. You invoice us, we pay on agreed terms — no chasing, no exceptions.

items.title: Exclusive Project Pipeline
items.desc: Gain direct access to pre-qualified, high-budget research projects from China's fastest-growing tech, FMCG, and automotive brands. We vet all opportunities for feasibility and budget realism before they reach you.

items.title: End-to-End Partnership Management
items.desc: We handle everything: client negotiations, scope translation, cultural bridging, and project oversight. You focus on what you do best — flawless fieldwork execution. One point of contact, zero communication gaps.

steps.title: Project Brief & Quotation
steps.desc: Receive a detailed project brief with clear objectives, target audience, and deliverables. Review the scope and submit your competitive quote within 48 hours.

steps.title: Fieldwork Execution
steps.desc: Upon selection, execute the project according to our standardized SOP. We provide ongoing support and handle all client communications throughout the fieldwork phase.

steps.title: Delivery & Settlement
steps.desc: Submit final deliverables and invoice upon milestone completion. Receive payment within 15 business days directly from our Hong Kong entity in your preferred currency.

requirements.title: Partner Qualification Standards
requirements.subtitle: We maintain rigorous vetting criteria to ensure world-class execution across all markets

items.title: Corporate Credentials
points: Valid business registration and operational license (corporate entities only, no sole proprietors)
Minimum 3 years of established market research operations (5+ years preferred)
Active membership in ESOMAR, MRS (UK), CASRO/IA (US), or equivalent industry associations
Minimum 2 verifiable client references from international research projects

items.title: Operational Capabilities
points: Proprietary respondent database with active recruitment networks across key regions
Proven expertise in both B2C mass market and B2B specialized/hard-to-reach populations
Professional infrastructure: dedicated qualitative research facilities, stable connectivity, recording equipment
Native-speaking moderators with research methodology training and bilingual project coordinators

items.title: Data Security & Regulatory Compliance
points: Full compliance with LGPD, GDPR, and local data protection regulations
Documented PII handling protocols with explicit informed consent procedures
Secure data storage infrastructure with encryption standards and defined retention policies
Clear data sovereignty protocols (storage location, cross-border transfer mechanisms)

items.title: Rigorous Quality Assurance Framework
points: Pre-session activation QC with N+50% over-recruitment buffer to ensure full attendance
Real-time on-site environment monitoring and technical quality checks
Minimum 10% audio/video sampling rate with bilingual verification for accuracy validation
Post-project debrief and continuous improvement feedback loop
